theme_and_archetype.archetype: Mixed Multi-Persona (Organic & Earthy for Individual, Performance Pro for Shop Owner, Swiss & High-Contrast for CA)
theme_and_archetype.reasoning: The app requires three distinct design languages to serve completely different mental models. The Individual needs calm trust and encouragement. The Shop Owner needs high-visibility tactical speed for rapid ledger entries. The CA needs dense, objective data clarity to manage multiple clients.

typography.rules: Avoid Inter for headings. Ensure high contrast and strict hierarchy. Use tight tracking for headings.

mono.usage: Currency formatting, ledger entries, tabular data.

colors.global_rules: Never use pure #000000 or #808080. Tint greys. Ensure WCAG AA contrast for text. Provide distinct dark mode scales.

individual.name: Calm & Encouraging
individual.style: Soft shadows, generous padding (p-6 to p-8), rounded-2xl to rounded-3xl.

shop_owner.name: Bold POS-style
shop_owner.style: High-contrast borders, solid shadows, sharp corners (rounded-md), chunky touch targets.

ca.name: Professional Info-Dense
ca.style: Dense layouts, 1px subtle borders (Grid Borders), crisp edges (rounded-sm), minimal padding (p-4).

spacing_and_layout.global_strategy: Mobile-first responsive grids. Bottom navigation on mobile. Distinct bento-style layouts for desktop.
spacing_and_layout.individual: Generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 inside cards. gap-6 between elements. The 'Tetris' grid logic with breathing room for savings goals.
spacing_and_layout.shop_owner: Tactical spacing. Large buttons (h-14). Full-width elements on mobile for quick one-handed tapping. Cash ledger must be instantly accessible.
spacing_and_layout.ca: The 'Control Room' grid. Dense, data correlation. gap-4. Every pixel utilized. Tabular structures with horizontal scrolling for client lists.
spacing_and_layout.navigation: Bottom navigation per persona for mobile (fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50). Desktop uses side nav or top sticky nav with crystal glassmorphism.

components_strategy.charts: Use Recharts for Donut and Line charts. Ensure INR formatting (e.g., ₹1,00,000). Use distinct chart colors based on persona primary color.
components_strategy.forms: Use Shadcn customized per persona. Large inputs for Shop Owner. Dense, multi-column forms for CA.
components_strategy.cards: Individual: Glassmorphism or soft Neumorphism. Shop Owner: High-contrast solid borders. CA: Technical grid borders.
components_strategy.currency_formatting: Always use Indian Numbering System (e.g., 1,00,000.00). Include ₹ symbol.
components_strategy.buttons: Must have active/hover/focus states. Individual (rounded-full), Shop Owner (rounded-md, heavy font), CA (rounded-sm, compact).

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must shift visually. Buttons: translate-y-[-1px] and slight shadow increase.
motion_and_interactions.feedback: Micro-interactions for Shop Owner quick entry (e.g., flash green for credit, red for debit).
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Ensure focus rings are visible.

media_and_assets.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react). Duotone for Individual, Bold for Shop Owner, Regular/Light for CA.

image_urls.description: Abstract calm green background for the Individual persona selection card
Abstract bold amber swirls for the Shop Owner persona selection card
Abstract deep blue light patterns for the CA persona selection card

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react recharts clsx tailwind-merge framer-motion`
Add fonts to the project: Outfit, IBM Plex Sans, IBM Plex Mono.
Create a Persona picker view on first launch that saves selection to state/localStorage.
Implement 3 distinct dashboards based on the active persona, applying different Tailwind color variables, border-radius strategies, and spacing per persona.
Build the Individual dashboard with KPI cards, donut chart, line chart, and savings goals.
Build the Shop Owner dashboard with a cash ledger, credit/debit quick entry, daily reset logic (mocked), and transaction feed.
Build the CA dashboard with a dense client list, status badges, and task management.
Integrate AI-powered insights widgets for all personas.
Ensure all currency values use the Indian numbering format with the ₹ symbol.
Build bottom navigation for mobile using fixed positioning (`fixed bottom-0 w-full`).
Build a unified Pricing page with 3 tiers.
Ensure Shadcn UI components are customized to match the active persona's aesthetic using CSS variables.
Implement dark mode support using Tailwind's `dark:` classes.
Add `data-testid` attributes to all interactive elements.
